unresolved_questions: Conolite® Aircraft Laminates product page (https://www.argosyinternational.com/conolite-cargo-liners/) is marked 'Protected' (password-gated), so detailed specs, FAA approvals, and SKU variants could not be confirmed from the corpus.

Individual product detail pages for all crash test barriers and energy absorbers were not fetched (skipped in crawl); descriptions are drawn from the product listing page summaries only — NDAA/compliance claims and full specs may exist on those pages.
Plataine is a third-party software product (distributed by Argosy); category assigned as ground_segment as best fit — it is an IIoT/AI manufacturing optimization platform, not a drone-specific GCS.
Infrastructure Repair Materials sub-products POXPLUG™ and Hydrowrap™ appear on a category archive page (resource-0006) but are not in the prioritized list; they were omitted per instructions.
